name: Caramel Apple Walnut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, oats, sugar, baking soda and salt. Cut in the butter until crumbly.
3. Press about 11/4 cups of the crumb mixture into a 13x9-inch baking pan. Bake for 15 minutes.
4. Add walnuts to the crumb mixture.
5. In a heavy saucepan, melt caramels with sweetened condensed milk and stir until smooth.
6. Spoon apple filling over the crust. Top with caramel mixture, then remaining crumb mixture.
7. Bake for 20 minutes or until set. Cool; serve warm.
8. Serves 10-12.
